title: Soul
description: Frontmatter contract for a SoulForge soul file. The markdown body is convention; the frontmatter is enforced.

name.description: Kebab-case identifier for the agent. Must be unique within a project.

version.description: Semver. Bump major for identity changes that downstream consumers would notice.

provider_hint.description: Suggested model provider. The soul is provider-agnostic; this is a hint, not a requirement.

scope.description: What this agent is for. Each item is a single short sentence.

refuses.description: What this agent will not do. Each item is a single short sentence.

tags.description: Free-form tags for grouping souls in a registry.

planning.description: Reasoning posture before tool calls. 'scratchpad' = write explicit goal→steps→fallback before any tool call. 'explicit-schema' = declare the full pipeline handoff record and step sequence before execution (deterministic workflow pattern). 'interval' = pause every N action steps to update fact list and re-examine plan (pair with planning_interval_steps). Omit or use 'none' for agents that act immediately.

planning_interval_steps.description: Used when planning is 'interval'. Number of action steps between mid-run planning checks. Default: 3.

action_format.description: The format the agent uses to express tool calls. 'code' = agent writes executable Python snippets to orchestrate tools. 'json' = agent emits structured JSON tool-call objects (standard ReAct). 'text' = free-form prose actions. Default: 'json'.

max_retries.description: Maximum number of structured-output validation retries per turn. When the model's output fails schema validation the eval harness re-prompts with the validation error, up to this budget. 0 means no retry (fail immediately). Omit to use the harness default (1).

output_schema.description: Declares the expected structured output shape. Use a relative path ending in '.json' to reference a JSON Schema file (the eval harness will validate outputs against it as a hard contract). Use '#Section Name' to point to a schema block in the soul's own markdown body. Omit for souls whose output is free-form text.
